heading: Assistance by independent states of former Soviet Union for Cuban Government
label: 6036 Assistance by independent states of former Soviet Union for Cuban Government
notes: CodificationSection is comprised of . Subsecs. (b), (c), and (d)(2) of amended sections 2295a and 2295b of this title.section 106 of Pub. L. 104–114section 106 of Pub. L. 104–114

children.heading: Reporting requirement
children.label: a Reporting requirement
children.text: Not later than 90 days after , the President shall submit to the appropriate congressional committees a report detailing progress toward the withdrawal of personnel of any independent state of the former Soviet Union (within the meaning of ), including advisers, technicians, and military personnel, from the Cienfuegos nuclear facility in Cuba.March 12, 1996section 5801 of this title

children.heading: Disapproval of credits
children.label: 1 Disapproval of credits
children.text: The Congress expresses its strong disapproval of the extension by Russia of credits equivalent to $200,000,000 in support of the intelligence facility at Lourdes, Cuba, in November 1994.
